name: Savoy Cabbage Rolls
recipeIngredient: 3 Links spicy-sweet sausage, preferably reduced-fat turkey sausage
1 small bunch tender scallions, green part only, chopped
1/4 cup Finely chopped celery with leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Loosen cabbage core with a paring knife.
2. Plunge the whole cabbage into a pot of boiling water.
3. Boil gently for 10 minutes, or until leaves begin to soften.
4. Drain the cabbage; carefully remove about 10 large outer leaves.
5. Shred the inner leaves.
6. While the cabbage is boiling, break the sausage casings and sauté the meat in oil until brown. Drain on paper towels.
7. In a large bowl, mix rice with sausage, scallions, celery, half of the parsley, and egg. Season to taste.
8. Put about 2 tablespoons of the rice mixture in the center of each leaf.
9. Fold the leaves, envelope style, and place seam side down (in one layer) in a large skillet.
10. Pour Savoy sauce over the rolls.
11. Sprinkle with shredded inner cabbage leaves.
12. Cover the skillet and simmer for 30-40 minutes.
13. Before serving, sprinkle with the remaining half cup of parsley.
Savoy Sauce:
Puree 1 large can peeled tomatoes in a blender or food processor with 1 teaspoon sugar. Add a generous pinch of dried rosemary and thyme, or fresh herbs of your choice.
